benefits.title: Personal training—without the usual hassle
benefits.subtitle: Group Fit keeps booking simple. You choose an activity, session address, and time. You only see coaches who can accept that session, with secure in-app payments and optional private group cost-splitting.
benefits.trainAnywhereDesc: Home, condo gym, park, or a facility you arrange (where permitted).
benefits.moreWaysDesc: Choose from 35+ activities, including strength, boxing, yoga, sport training and more.
benefits.privateGroupDesc: Train with friends or family at the same time and location.
benefits.verifiedCoachesDesc: Trainer credentials are reviewed and identity verification is completed during onboarding.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: You choose the session location—home, condo gym, park, or a facility you arrange (where permitted). You enter the address during booking and the coach comes to that location.
faq.q2: Why does the list of coaches change when I change the address?
faq.a2: Availability is based on the session address selected in Group Fit. Changing the address can change which coaches cover that area and who is available at your selected time.
faq.q4: Can I book with friends or family and split the cost?
faq.a4: Yes. Group bookings are private (your own people). You can split the session cost inside Group Fit so there's no manual collecting.
faq.q5: What if I don't see options for my activity or time?
faq.a5: Try a different time or date, or choose a different activity. Availability depends on the session address, the activity selected, and coach schedules.

cta.title: Ready to train on your schedule?
cta.subtitle: Download Group Fit and find available trainers near you

hero.title: About
hero.subtitle: Group Fit is a Canadian platform built to make booking on-location training straightforward. You choose what you want to train, enter your session address, pick a time, and book a coach who's available for that exact session—without the usual back-and-forth.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To make fitness accessible, affordable, and convenient by connecting people with certified trainers for personalised in-person sessions anytime, anywhere.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To enrich lives by providing easy access to diverse fitness activities, empowering individuals to achieve their health goals flexibly and enjoyably.

whyBuilt.title: Why We Built Group Fit
whyBuilt.content: Too many people want to train consistently but get stuck on the same obstacles:
whyBuilt.obstacles: limited options, inconvenient locations, and unreliable scheduling
whyBuilt.conclusion: Group Fit was created to remove those barriers by bringing qualified coaching to where people actually train—on their schedule, at their location.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Book a personal training session in three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select your activity, enter your session address, and pick your preferred time.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See only coaches who match your location, time, and activity—no guesswork.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Complete secure payment in-app and meet your coach at your location.

hero.title: How booking works in Group Fit
hero.subtitle: Booking is built around your selected activity, session address, and time—so you only see coaches who can accept that session.

step1.title: Choose your activity
step1.description: Start with the training style you want. Explore options on our activities page.

step2.title: Enter your session address
step2.description: Use the exact address where you want to train. Coach availability is based on this address.

step3.title: Pick your date & time
step3.description: Choose when you want to train. Availability updates based on schedule and location coverage.

step4.title: Select an available coach
step4.description: Pick from coaches shown as available for that session (address + time + activity).

step5.title: Pay in-app and train
step5.description: Complete the booking and meet your coach at the selected location.

hero.title: Run your schedule.
hero.subtitle: Move your clients onto Group Fit so bookings and payments run cleanly—without DMs, spreadsheets, or chasing.

benefits.setScheduleDesc: Pick your time slots and what you coach.
benefits.setLocationsDesc: Only show up for clients inside your service area.
benefits.noDoubleBookingsDesc: Buffer time blocks back-to-back sessions automatically.
benefits.paymentsHandledDesc: Group Fit handles payments so you don't have to chase clients. Transparent payouts with clear earnings visibility in the app.
benefits.matchNote: Clients can only book when they match your radius, hours, and specialty.

shareProfile.title: Invite your existing clients in 15 seconds
shareProfile.subtitle: Share your public profile link. Your clients book you directly—only when it matches your settings.
shareProfile.startTip: Start by sending your profile link to your existing clients today.

howClientsBook.title: How clients book you
howClientsBook.subtitle: Clients can only book when all of these match:
howClientsBook.example: Monday: CN Tower (Toronto) + 25 km radius + 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM → Only clients inside the radius booking within that time can book you.
howClientsBook.clientsDo: choose specialization → pick time → enter address → book

bonus.title: Bonus: new clients can find you on Group Fit
bonus.subtitle: When customers search in your coverage area for your specialties, you can appear—without changing how you run your existing clients.

testimonials.title: Hear from trainers using Group Fit
testimonials.subtitle: Real trainers share how Group Fit helps them manage their schedule and grow their business.

hero.title: Set your availability and service locations. Group Fit does the rest.
hero.subtitle: Move existing clients into a clean booking flow. Only valid bookings get through.
hero.note: You appear only for matching requests—right specialty, right time, right location.

steps.step1Desc: 35+ specializations—HIIT, Boxing, Jiu Jitsu, and more.
steps.step2Desc: Create time windows per day (example: Monday 8:00 AM–3:00 PM and 5:00 PM–8:00 PM).
steps.step2Note: Outside your time slots? Clients can't book you.
steps.step3Desc: Assign different locations and radiuses to different days.
steps.step3Note: Outside your radius? Clients can't book you.
steps.step3Example: Monday: 25 km radius from CN Tower (Toronto). Tuesday–Friday: 30 km radius from Square One (Mississauga).
steps.step4Desc: Choose how much time between sessions (up to 1 hour).
steps.step4Example: Booked at 9:00 AM with a 30-minute buffer → next available shows at 10:30 AM.
steps.step5Desc: Request a change in the app. Group Fit manages the client confirmation flow.

shareProfile.title: Share your profile link
shareProfile.subtitle: Account → My Profile → 3 dots → View Public Profile → Share

bonus.title: Bonus: rules-based discovery
bonus.subtitle: Group Fit shows your profile only to customers who match your specialization, time slots, and service location radius.
